The fastest and most feature-rich hybrid web trading experience, designed to elevate your crypto journey with advanced analytics and high-speed execution.

Launch App

Read Docs

Buy and sell in one click, giving you the competitive edge needed in fast-paced markets. With wallet tracking and twitter monitoring, Interstate is packed with powerful features tailored for both beginners and pro traders.

Powerful Features

Everything you need to trade with speed and confidence

⚡

Buy on Migration

Automatically buy tokens the moment they migrate, securing early entries on new launches.

📈

Sell on Migration

Lock in profits automatically when tokens migrate, ensuring you never miss a profitable exit.

🎯

Spot Buys

Execute instant spot purchases with optimized routing for the best available price.

💰

Quick Sell

One-click selling lets you exit positions instantly when speed matters most.

🐦

Twitter Monitor

Track influential accounts in real time and act on market-moving tweets before the crowd.

👁

Wallet Tracking

Follow top-performing wallets and mirror successful traders' moves in real time.

📊

Limit Orders

Set precise entry and exit points with advanced limit orders that execute automatically.

🔧

Migration Tools

Complete suite of migration tools to help you capitalize on every token launch event.

Every Second Counts

In the market of token launches and high-frequency trading, every second counts, and Interstate is your ultimate tool for securing massive gains. Whether you're here to capitalize on the latest opportunities or execute trades with confidence, Interstate provides you with precision, speed, and reliability.

Our Mission

At Interstate, our mission is to build a comprehensive, all-in-one trading platform that not only delivers unmatched performance but also rewards our users for being part of our growth. We are committed to being the fastest, most efficient, and most community-driven trading experience in the market—implementing the features you want most while ensuring a seamless and rewarding journey.

— The Interstate Team

Ready to Trade?

Join Interstate and experience the future of trading today.

Get Started
